revision.content:
With the termination of Amazon Smile (a charitable giving program that would donate a portion of one's purchases on Amazon to a charity of your choice), one way to passively fundraise for Bloominglabs is through Kroger Community Rewards.


== Signup Details ==

[[Image:QR_KrogerCommunityRewards.png|none|thumb|150px|Kroger Community Rewards URL]]
* https://www.kroger.com/i/community/community-rewards

* Create a Kroger account
* Link it to your Kroger Plus shopping card
* Add Bloominglabs as your community rewards organization:
 Organization Name: BLOOMINGLABS INC
 Organization Number: LY860

* If you can not find Bloominglabs in the search, you need to set a local Kroger store as your default store first. If you have a non-local address set or you created your shopper plus card while living outside of Bloomington then our organization may not show up in search results.

After doing the above, any time a purchase is made using your Kroger card, a portion of the purchase is directed to Bloominglabs. It's easy and costs you nothing!
